Package com.arcade.model

Class GameSession

java.lang.Object
com.arcade.model.GameSession
public class GameSession extends Object
Represents the current state of a running game session.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GameSession()
    Creates an empty game session with default values.
    GameSession(int currentScore, int remainingLives, int currentQuestionIndex, List<Question> loadedQuestions, boolean gameOver)
    Creates a game session with all fields initialized.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    getCurrentQuestionIndex()
    Returns the current question index.
    int
    getCurrentScore()
    Returns the current score.
    List<Question>
    getLoadedQuestions()
    Returns the loaded questions for the session.
    int
    getRemainingLives()
    Returns the remaining lives.
    boolean
    isGameOver()
    Returns whether the game is over.
    void
    setCurrentQuestionIndex(int currentQuestionIndex)
    Sets the current question index.
    void

    Sets the current score.
    void
    setGameOver(boolean gameOver)
    Sets the game over state.
    void
    setLoadedQuestions(List<Question> loadedQuestions)
    Replaces the loaded questions for the session.
    void
    setRemainingLives(int remainingLives)
    Sets the remaining lives.

  • Constructor Details

    • GameSession

      public GameSession()
      Creates an empty game session with default values.

    • GameSession

      public GameSession(int currentScore, int remainingLives, int currentQuestionIndex, List<Question> loadedQuestions, boolean gameOver)
      Creates a game session with all fields initialized.
      Parameters:
      currentScore - the current score
      remainingLives - the remaining lives
      currentQuestionIndex - the current question index
      loadedQuestions - the loaded questions
      gameOver - the game over state

    • isGameOver

      public boolean isGameOver()
      Returns whether the game is over.
      Returns:
      true if the game is over; otherwise false
